quotes.verbatim_quote:
* Never start on beat one.

¢ Never end on beat one.

* Play predominantly eighth notes.

¢ Play without using eighth notes.

* Anticipate chords by 1/2 beat, by 1 beat, by 1 1/2 beats, by 2 beats, by 2 1/2 beats, by 3 beats.

* Resolve late by 1 beat, 2 beats, 3 beats, or + beats.
quotes.why_load_bearing: Six core rhythmic grammar constraints for phrase placement.

quotes.verbatim_quote:
Leave periods at the ends of sentences and paragraphs. Know when to end your solo. Listen to the

rests. The listener will invite your next idea.
quotes.why_load_bearing: Silence and endings are active compositional choices.
